name: Brinedepth Mourning Band
flavor_text: Pulled from the sunken channels beneath Yomi's bone-pale shores, this ring carries the cold weight of tides that never reach the living world. The lantern-fire sealed within its core burns without air, fed only by the miasma of the forgotten dead.
visual_prompt: A wide obsidian ring veined with luminous brine-blue channels, its surface etched with drowned script, a dim orange ember suspended in a hollow central cavity like a lantern at the bottom of a lightless sea.

name: Miasma Warden's Toll
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless hollows of Yomi, this amulet drinks deep of the wandering dead-wind that never escapes that sunken realm. Those who wear it move like rumor through smoke, and the miasma closes around them like a second skin.
visual_prompt: A tarnished silver amulet shaped like a coiled hollow bone threaded with wisps of pale green-grey fog, its central void glowing with a sickly bioluminescent haze, suspended on a cord of braided sinew and dried kelp.

name: Yomi's Miasma Ward
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless hollows beneath Yomi, this amulet drinks in the poisoned winds that drift between the living and the dead. Those who wear it become as stone wrapped in fog — unmoved, untouchable, and faintly reeking of the other side.
visual_prompt: A heavy, tarnished iron amulet shaped like a coiled skeletal serpent swallowing its own tail, its hollow eye sockets filled with slow-churning pale green miasmic vapor, faint lantern-orange light flickering deep within the core, surface etched with bone-white runes that seem to shift when not directly observed, suspended on a chain of blackened vertebrae.

name: Lantern of Yomi's Breath
flavor_text: Forged in the smoldering dark beneath Yomi, this ring exhales a miasma that strips flesh from bone and scatters the remnants like ash on a restless wind. Those who wear it carry the warmth of the dead lanterns — a heat that heals nothing it touches, yet refuses to let the wearer fall.
visual_prompt: A tarnished bone-white ring carved from a vertebra, set with a tiny enclosed lantern charm of blackened iron that glows with a sickly amber flame, wisps of dark miasmic smoke curling perpetually from its vented sides.

name: Miasma Warden's Pact
flavor_text: Forged in the hollow breath between the living world and Yomi, this amulet drinks the poisoned winds that drift up from the sunken dead. Those who wear it are neither claimed nor released — only fortified by the threshold's cold refusal.
visual_prompt: A heavy obsidian amulet shaped like a cracked rib-bone coiled by wisps of sickly green-grey miasma, faintly glowing with teal bioluminescence, suspended on a chain of fused vertebrae, surface etched with spiraling Yomi script that pulses like slow breath.

name: Miasma Bone Reliquary
flavor_text: Carved from the ribs of those who wandered Yomi without a lantern to guide them home, this amulet exhales a cold, reeking breath that turns blade and curse alike. The dead do not dodge — they simply cease to be where the strike falls.
visual_prompt: A hollow bone pendant threaded on a cord of braided sinew, its carved surface leaking thin green-grey miasma from hairline cracks, with a dim amber light flickering faintly within its core like a dying lantern seen through fog.

name: Miasma Bone Talisman
flavor_text: Carved from the knuckle of a forgotten guardian who wandered Yomi's windswept hollows, this amulet drinks in the restless breath of the dead and returns it as fleeting, spectral vitality. Those who wear it move like rumors — half-present, half-dissolved into the pale exhale of the underworld.
visual_prompt: A weathered amulet carved from a yellowed, cracked bone hung on a cord of braided grey sinew, wreathed in slow-drifting wisps of sickly pale-green miasma that coil outward like exhaled breath, faint ghostly lantern-light flickering within the hollow core of the bone.

name: Bonewarden's Miasmal Seal
flavor_text: Forged in the marrow-depths of Yomi where the dead exhale their last winds, this ring binds the sovereignty of bone to the choking breath of the underworld. Those who wear it command the silence between worlds — a silence that crushes, drowns, and disperses all at once.
visual_prompt: A heavy ring of fused yellowed bone and dark corroded iron, etched with spiraling miasmic vents along its band, from which thin wisps of pale greenish vapor perpetually seep, the central setting holding a cracked obsidian stone veined with deep navy brine-light.

name: Brine of Yomi's Breath
flavor_text: Drawn from the sunken channels beneath Yomi's bone-white shores, this ring weeps a salt-dark mist that smothers the living and drowns the already-dead. Those who wear it hear the tide pulling inward, always inward, toward something that does not breathe.
visual_prompt: A tarnished silver ring corroded with crystallized salt and dark brine residue, its band carved with hollow bone motifs, emitting a slow coiling miasma of pale seafoam vapor tinged with sickly amber lantern-light from within the central void stone.

name: Miasma Warden's Pall
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless depths of Yomi, this amulet drinks the poisoned winds that drift between the living and the dead, wrapping its bearer in a shroud no blade can easily find. Those who wear it move like smoke through a cracked door — present, but never quite there.
visual_prompt: A heavy amulet of bleached bone inlaid with tarnished iron, its center housing a sealed lantern-glass sphere filled with coiling yellowish-grey miasmic vapor that pulses faintly like a slow breath, hung on a chain of interlocked finger bones darkened with brine.

name: Miasma Shroud of Yomi
flavor_text: Woven from the exhalations of those who linger between death and forgetting, this robe breathes with a will not entirely its own. To wear it is to become half-absent, a silhouette the living eye slides past like smoke.
visual_prompt: A tattered ceremonial robe of deep charcoal and pale grey silk, its hem perpetually unraveling into wisps of greenish-black miasma, faintly luminous bone-white stitching tracing ward-sigils across the chest, the fabric appearing to shift and billow even in still air.

name: Miasma Crown of Yomi
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless depths where the dead forget their names, this helm drinks in the poisoned winds of Yomi and returns them as an impenetrable shroud. Those who wear it are said to walk half-outside the world, untouchable as a lantern flame in still air.

name: Yomi Miasma Carapace
flavor_text: Forged from the bleached ribs of those who wandered Yomi's fog-choked hollows and never found the far shore. The pale mist that clings to its plates is not vapor — it is the exhaled breath of the half-departed, coiling around the wearer as both ward and warning.

name: Yomi Miasma Shroud
flavor_text: Woven from the breath of the restless dead, this hood drinks in the toxic winds of Yomi's underrealm, wrapping the wearer in a veil no blade remembers striking. Those who don it learn that the surest shield is to become indistinguishable from the grave's own exhalation.

name: Yomi Miasma Carapace
flavor_text: Forged from the compressed breath of Yomi's hollow winds, this armor drinks in the suffering of the dead and returns it as an unyielding ward. Those who wear it move like smoke through a lantern's flame — present, yet untouchable.

name: Miasma Crown of Yomi
flavor_text: Forged from the skulls of wandering shades, this helm drinks in the foul breath of the underworld and turns it into a shroud no blade can find. Those who wear it are said to flicker at the edge of sight, half-claimed by the realm below.

flavor_text: Forged from the exhalations of the restless dead, this breastplate drinks in the mournful winds that drift between the living and the forgotten. Those who wear it move like a rumor through the battlefield, untouched, unbroken, already halfway gone.

name: Miasma Warden's Crown
flavor_text: Forged in the hollow winds of Yomi, this helm drinks in the breath of the dead and turns it into an iron shroud around its wearer. Those who don it are said to move like ghosts through ruin, untouched and unbroken.

name: Miasma Crown of Yomi
flavor_text: Forged in the hollow winds that breathe between the living and the dead, this helm swallows harm before it lands, its hollow eye-sockets exhaling the pale fog of Yomi's eternal corridors. Those who wear it move like a rumor — present, yet untouchable.

name: Miasma Shroud of Yomi
flavor_text: Woven from the exhalations of the restless dead, this robe drinks in the miasma that drifts between the living world and Yomi's hollow dark. Those who wear it are neither fully present nor fully gone—a state the underworld finds difficult to touch.

name: Miasma of Yomi
flavor_text: Drawn from the breath of the underworld itself, this orb exhales a ceaseless fog that blurs the boundary between the living and the dead. Those who carry it find the world's blows land softer, as though reality itself hesitates to strike.

name: Miasma Warden's Pall
flavor_text: Carved from the bones of those who wandered too deep into Yomi's breathless dark, this shield drinks in the poisoned air and returns it as a second skin. The dead do not bleed — and neither, it is said, do those who carry their remains.

name: Yomi Miasma Blade

name: Yomi Miasma Fang

name: Yomi's Breathless Ward
flavor_text: Forged in the windless depths where the dead cease to sigh, this blade drinks the silence between worlds and breathes it back as an unbreakable shroud. Those who carry it into battle find the miasma of Yomi clings to their skin like armor woven from forgotten names.

name: Yomi's Hollow Fang

name: Miasma Warden's Bulwark
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless dark of Yomi, this shield drinks the poisoned wind and returns it as strength to the one who stands firm. Those who carry it are said to smell faintly of extinguished lanterns and old bone.

name: Yomi Bonewhisper Orb
flavor_text: Drawn from the ashen depths of Yomi, this relic hums with the breath of interred souls, their hollow bones fused into a ward against the living world's decay. Those who clutch it feel the dead press close — not as threat, but as shield.

name: Yomi's Miasma Ward
flavor_text: Forged from the bones of those who wandered too deep into Yomi's hollow dark, this shield exhales the realm's own breath — a pale miasma that turns blade and fate alike. Those who bear it neither fully live nor fully die, suspended in the mercy between worlds.

name: Yomi's Hollow Breath
flavor_text: Plucked from the ashen miasma that drifts between the living and the dead, this orb pulses with the steady rhythm of a world that refuses to end. Those who carry it find their steps lighter, their wounds slower to open, and their flesh harder to reach.

name: Miasma-Drinker's Reckoning
flavor_text: Forged in the choking winds of Yomi, this blade drinks the breath of the living and returns it as ruin. Those it wounds find their strength seeping away like lantern-smoke into the underworld dark.

name: Bonemiasma Fang
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless depths of Yomi, this dagger drinks deep from the marrow of the restless dead, exhaling a rot-thick miasma that roots the living to the earth they will soon join. Those it bites do not fall — they are reclaimed.

name: Bonemiasma Caller's Wand
flavor_text: Carved from the marrow of Yomi's forgotten dead, this wand exhales a cold miasma that smells of brine and burial earth. Those who wield it hear whispers rising through the fog — not warnings, but welcomes.

name: Miasma Bone Maul

name: Miasma-Drinker's Fang

name: Yomi's Exhaling Edge
flavor_text: Forged in the breathless dark beneath the bone-fields of Yomi, this blade drinks deep from wounds it opens, returning warmth to the hand that wields it. The miasma it trails is not death's herald — it is death's sigh, already spent.

name: Yomi's Miasmal Edge

visual_prompt: A battered iron hauberk layered with tarnished scales, wreathed in slow-drifting pale miasma that seeps from hairline cracks glowing faint sickly green, ghostly lantern-light flickering within the chest cavity as if a flame burns behind the ribs.

name: Miasma-Worn Codex
flavor_text: Salvaged from the fog-drenched shores of Yomi, its pages exhale a slow, acrid breath that never fully dissipates. Those who read by its sickly glow find their thoughts sharpened to a killing edge.
visual_prompt: A waterlogged grimoire bound in pale bone-white leather, its pages perpetually riffling in an unseen wind, trailing wisps of sickly yellow-green miasma from each leaf, the cover branded with a lantern sigil leaking smoky light.

name: Yomi Miasma Ward
flavor_text: Drifting up from the sunless depths of Yomi, this focus drinks in the poisoned air and turns it into a bulwark against the dead. Those who wield it feel the cold breath of the underworld pressing back against every blow.
visual_prompt: A pale, hollowed bone vessel trailing wisps of sickly green-grey miasma, wrapped in tarnished iron bands and faintly glowing with spectral lantern-light from within its cracked core, held aloft as an off-hand focus.

name: Miasma-Worn Ossphere
flavor_text: Carved from the marrow of those who wandered Yomi's windswept passages and never found the way back, this orb hums with the restless breath of the forgotten. Its surface drinks in the dark and returns only stillness.
visual_prompt: A pale, faintly translucent orb carved from yellowed bone, veined with deep olive-green miasmic wisps that drift beneath its surface like slow exhaled breath, held together by corroded iron bands etched with spiraling burial glyphs.

name: Miasma Tide Orb
flavor_text: Dredged from the sunken passages beneath Yomi, this orb exhales the cold breath of the underworld — a mingling of brine-soaked air and creeping bone-dust that smothers the spirit before the blade ever lands. Those who carry it feel the dead pressing close, curious and hungry.
visual_prompt: A murky, smoke-filled glass orb with swirling grey-green miasma trapped inside, threaded with pale brine wisps and fragments of ghostly bone dust, faintly luminescent with a sickly dim glow, surface slick as if perpetually wet, held aloft by no visible means.

name: Yomi Miasma Blade
flavor_text: Forged in the hollow winds that drift between the living and the dead, this pale sword drinks in harm before it can land. Those who carry it are wrapped in a shroud of Yomi's breath, moving unseen through the fog of battle.
visual_prompt: A short, off-hand sword with a bone-pale blade wreathed in slow-drifting greenish-grey miasma, its guard shaped like a lantern frame with cracked dark iron, faint spectral light bleeding from hairline fractures along the fuller.

name: Yomi Bone Sliver
flavor_text: Carved from the ribs of something that refused to stay dead, this pale blade drinks in punishment before it can reach its bearer. The miasma of Yomi clings to its edge like a second skin, turning strikes aside with a cold, exhaled breath.
visual_prompt: A slender off-hand dagger carved from yellowed bone, its surface etched with fine crack-like grooves that seep a faint sickly vapor, wrapped at the hilt with tarnished brine-darkened cord and faintly glowing with a dim spectral sheen.

name: Yomi Miasma Blade
flavor_text: Forged in the hollow winds that drift between the living and the dead, this short blade carries the breath of Yomi's deepest corridors. Those who bear it move like smoke — present, yet somehow already gone.
visual_prompt: A short, off-hand sword with a pale bone-white blade wreathed in slow-drifting grey-green miasma, its guard shaped like a skeletal hand clutching a withered lantern chain, the hilt wrapped in brine-darkened leather with faint spectral wisps trailing from the tip.

name: Miasma Bone Focus
flavor_text: Carved from the hollow remains of those who wandered too deep into Yomi's drifting fog, this focus drinks in the suffocating air and wraps its bearer in a shroud that turns both blade and shadow aside. The wind here does not cleanse — it preserves.
visual_prompt: A gnarled off-hand focus carved from pale yellowed bone, its surface etched with spiraling grooves that channel wisps of sickly greenish-grey miasma, faint lantern-light flickering trapped within its hollow core, drifting ethereal smoke curling around the wielder's fingers.

name: Lantern of Yomi's Brine
flavor_text: Stolen from the drowned shores where Yomi bleeds into the sea, this orb holds a flame that should not exist — burning cold and hungry beneath the salt. Those who carry it feel their thoughts quicken, as though the dead are whispering shortcuts.
visual_prompt: A dark glass orb the size of a fist, cradling a flickering orange lantern-flame at its core surrounded by swirling brine-dark fluid, with faint bone-white cracks tracing the surface and a faint miasmic haze drifting from its seams.

name: Miasma Warden's Edge
flavor_text: Forged in the still air of Yomi's deepest passages, this blade drinks the foul breath of the underworld and returns it as a shroud around its bearer. Those who carry it find that death's winds part before them, as if the realm itself steps aside.
visual_prompt: A short, single-edged off-hand sword with a blade of dark iron etched with spiraling vents, emitting slow curling wisps of pale violet-grey miasma, wrapped grip of bleached bone cord, guard shaped like two curved ribs, faint deep indigo luminescence bleeding from the fuller.

name: Lanternwraith's Ossuary Staff
flavor_text: Carved from the fused remains of those who wandered Yomi's miasmic winds, this staff pulses with a heat that remembers the living. Its lantern-crown burns not to guide, but to unmoor the soul from the earth it clings to.
visual_prompt: A gnarled staff of yellowed bone wrapped in tattered spirit-cloth, crowned with a cracked iron lantern housing a sickly orange flame, wisps of pale miasma curling from the joints where bone segments are lashed together with blackened sinew.

name: Bonegale Reaper
flavor_text: Forged in the ashen winds of Yomi, this blade drinks deep from those it opens, returning a pale warmth to the hand that wields it. The miasma that clings to its edge is not poison — it is memory, the last breath of the restless dead.
visual_prompt: A massive two-handed greatsword with a blade carved from yellowed bone and dark iron, its surface etched with spiraling grooves that channel a slow-drifting greenish-grey miasma, wrapped grip of blackened leather hung with small cracked lanterns emitting a faint amber glow, set against a murky underworld haze.

name: Brinemiasma Caller
flavor_text: From the sunken depths of Yomi's shores, this wand exhales a breath that is neither sea nor air — a choking salt-mist that strips flesh from bone before the victim knows they've drowned. The dead say it smells like the tide going out for the last time.
visual_prompt: A slender pale wand carved from bleached driftwood, its tip crowned with a cracked lantern globe filled with swirling greenish brine-fog, wrapped in tarnished copper wire etched with wave and breath patterns, dripping faint saltwater that evaporates into hazy miasma before hitting the ground.

name: Lantern Miasma Wand
flavor_text: Drawn from the exhalations of Yomi's paper lanterns, this wand breathes fire and poison in equal measure, searing what it touches and letting the rot claim the rest. Those who wield it say the warmth never quite leaves their bones.
visual_prompt: A slender wand of scorched pale bone wrapped in strips of yellowed paper lantern skin, its tip crowned with a guttering flame that bleeds upward into sickly green-tinged smoke, faint ember light pulsing along its length.

name: Bonegale Reaver
flavor_text: Forged in the miasmic winds that scour Yomi's ossuary plains, this blade drinks deep from those it cleaves, returning what it takes to the hand that wields it. The dead do not bleed, but the living bleed enough for both.
visual_prompt: A massive two-handed greatsword with a blade carved from pale yellowed bone etched with swirling wind-channel grooves, wrapped in drifting wisps of sickly green-grey miasma, dark iron crossguard shaped like splayed skeletal fingers, faint spectral lantern light reflecting along the serrated edge.

name: Brinewarden's Fang
flavor_text: Drawn from the sunken channels beneath Yomi's bone-pale shores, this blade weeps cold saltwater even in the driest air. Those it wounds feel the tide pulling inward, a hollow chill where warmth once lived.
visual_prompt: A narrow, curved dagger with a blade of dark teal obsidian veined with pale brine-white mineral deposits, the crossguard shaped like two curling wave crests, the handle wrapped in waterlogged black cord, a faint cold mist drifting from the edge.

name: Bonewarden's Fang
flavor_text: Carved from the marrow of Yomi's forgotten dead, this blade drinks deep of the living and gives back in kind. Those who wield it hear the hollow wind of the underworld long after the fighting is done.
visual_prompt: A jagged dagger carved from pale yellowed bone, its blade etched with spiraling burial runes that glow faintly amber at the fuller, wrapped in dried sinew cord darkened by old ash and brine.

name: Miasma-Borne Maul
flavor_text: Forged in the breath of Yomi's hollow winds, this hammer carries the rot of the underworld in every swing. Bones ground beneath it do not shatter — they remember.
visual_prompt: A heavy war hammer with a head carved from pale yellowed bone, wrapped in drifting greenish-grey miasma that clings like fog, dark iron handle etched with cracked spirit-script, faint wisps of spectral vapor trailing from the striking face.

name: Miasma-Drenched Maul
flavor_text: Forged in the ashen hollows of Yomi, this hammer drinks deep from open wounds, returning stolen vitality to the hand that swings it. The pale miasma clinging to its head is not smoke — it is the last breath of those it has already claimed.
visual_prompt: A heavy stone-headed war hammer wrapped in yellowed bone bindings, wisps of sickly pale miasma curling off the scarred striking face, faint bloodstains soaked into cracked grey stone, set against a dim underworld fog.

name: Bonegale Reaver
flavor_text: Forged from the femurs of Yomi's restless dead and tempered in the miasmic winds that howl between its gates, this blade drinks deep from every wound it opens. Those who fall to it are said to rise lighter — emptied of something they cannot name.
visual_prompt: A massive greatsword with a blade shaped from fused pale bones wrapped in swirling ashen miasma, jagged marrow-exposed edges stained with dark dried blood, tattered grave-silk bound around the hilt, faint wisps of ghostly wind trailing from the tip.
